shell.promise: Give me a picture or a line. I will find the moment where its story starts to open.

settings.title: Moment AI Routes
settings.description: Connector configuration still lives in shared runtime config. This panel only chooses which existing routes Moment should use.
settings.noTextTarget: No text.generate route is currently available.
settings.noVisionTarget: No text.generate.vision route is currently available.

moment.startSubtitle: You only need to place it here. The rest belongs to the moment opening itself.
moment.dropExamples: Old house, road lamp, small table, vending machine, side road, window, an empty platform.
moment.dropHint: Drop an image, or click to choose
moment.replaceImageHint: Click to replace it, or drop another image here
moment.phrasePlaceholder: For example: On the side of a small road, under a lamp, there is a vending machine, two benches, and a small table.
moment.inputMissing: Place an image or write one line first.
moment.runtimeMissingText: Moment does not have a usable text route yet.
moment.runtimeMissingVision: Moment does not have a usable vision route yet.
moment.runtimeMissingPlay: Moment does not have a usable continuation route yet.
moment.runtimeNoteTitle: This moment still needs AI routes
moment.runtimeNoteMissingText: Choose a usable text route for Moment first.
moment.runtimeNoteMissingVision: Image mode still needs a usable vision route.
moment.runtimeNoteIssues: There are still {{count}} runtime issues. Switch routes if needed.
moment.customLineLabelSealing: If you still want to look a little further, say one short line
moment.customLinePlaceholder: For example: I wait a little farther away to see whether anyone still comes tonight.
moment.exampleTitle: The light is still on, as if the appointment was never cancelled
moment.exampleSubtitle: An ordinary scene reveals a little story first.
moment.emptyTitle: Your scene will stay here first
moment.emptySubtitle: Once an image enters, it should remain on the stage.
moment.actionsTitleSealing: If you want, you can look one step further
moment.sealedNote: Let this moment stop here. You did not go farther, but you know it is no longer just an ordinary scene tonight.

Auth.clickToAuthorize: Click the mark to finish browser authorization
Auth.emailNotRegistered: This email is not registered yet
Auth.otpConfirmMessage: Send a verification code to this email to continue login?
Auth.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.registerConfirmHint: This looks like a new account. Confirm to create it and sign in.
Auth.setPasswordHint: Set a password for this email before continuing.
Auth.twoFaHint: Enter the two-factor code to continue
